title: Rag and Bone Man

startPoint.en: Talk to the Odd Old Man at the quarry west of Paterdomus.
startPoint.es: Habla con el Odd Old Man en la cantera al oeste de Paterdomus.

items.name: Logs (type)
items.display: 8 core logs of any type (can be collected during quest, eternal magic logs does not work)

items.name: Rope
items.display: A rope (needed to get into Lumbridge Swamp Cave if you haven't placed a rope there before, unless you have started The Lost Tribe)

recommended.name: Varrock
recommended.display: Teleport methods to Varrock, and Falador

recommended.name: Explorer's ring 3
recommended.display: Explorer's ring 3 or 4 for quick access to Draynor Village (Cabbage-port)

recommended.name: Invitation box
recommended.display: Invitation box for quick access to the Odd Old Man

children.name: Fort Forinthry lodestone
children.display: If not owned, use the Fort Forinthry lodestone or the earth altar teleport.

recommended.name: Yanille lodestone
recommended.display: Yanille lodestone activated if not Spirit tree (in order to go to Yanille)

recommended.name: Law rune
recommended.display: 1 law rune and 1 air rune for Telekinetic Grab if killing a monkey in Ardougne Zoo.

kills: You will need to kill a variety of monsters to obtain their bones (most common level 2 to 23).

text.en: one or more empty pots (can be reused)
Talk to the Odd Old Man in Silvarea.
text.es: Habla con el Odd Old Man en Silvarea.

chatOptions: 1 Anything I can do to help?

text.en: Go to Draynor Village market and talk to Fortunato about the quest (do not steal from the stalls before talking to him, as you won't be able to initiate the conversation for a couple of minutes).
text.es: Ve al mercado de Draynor Village y habla con Fortunato sobre la misión (no robes en los puestos antes de hablar con él, ya que no podrás iniciar la conversación durante un par de minutos).

chatOptions: 2 Talk about Rag and Bone Man.

text.en: Buy 8 jugs of vinegar.
Use the jugs of vinegar on your empty pots.
text.es: Usa las jarras de vinagre en tus vasijas vacías.

text.en: Gather and use each bone listed below on the pots of vinegar.
text.es: Consigue y usa cada hueso indicado a continuación en las vasijas de vinagre.

text.en: Obtain the bones. Use the table below as a reference.
text.es: Consigue los huesos. Usa la tabla siguiente como referencia.

text.en: Goblin skull |Goblin | * East of the River Lum in Lumbridge * Near the Draynor lodestone and the Wizard's Tower * East of Barbarian Village and south-west of the Grand Exchange * Stronghold of Security * Goblin Village * Port Sarim * By the Coal truck mine and Hemenster * Goblin Cave * Around the Varrock Dig Site * God Wars Dungeon

Bear ribs |Bear and Black bear | * Directly east of the Captured Temple * South of the Mind altar * Legends' Guild south-west mine (Fairy ring code BLR) * South of the fruit tree patch by the Tree Gnome Village * East of Rellekka
Big frog leg |Big Frog | * Inside of the Lumbridge Swamp Caves in the area in the south-east corner * Dorgesh-Kaan South Dungeon (fairy ring code AJQ)
Ram skull |Ram | * Fred the Farmer's pen, north of Lumbridge * Near the Wilderness wall, north of the Edgeville Monastery * South-west of Falador * In the Fisher Realm (Fairy ring code BJR)
Unicorn bone |Unicorn and black unicorn | * South of Seers' Village * South of Yanille * Ardougne Zoo (fairy ring code BIS) * East of Rellekka * Varrock south-east mine * South of Wilderness Crater
Monkey paw |Monkey | * North of Karamja lodestone * East of Karamja Volcano * Ardougne Zoo (must have level 33 Magic for Telekinetic Grab) * Mos Le'Harmless

Giant rat bone |Giant rat | * Stronghold of Security * Behind the Dancing Donkey Inn in south-east Varrock * Varrock sewers * South-west of Port Sarim * Behind Lumbridge Castle and Lumbridge swamp * In the pen south of Varrock * Edgeville dungeon
Giant bat wing |Giant bat | * Yanille Dungeon * Legends' Guild basement * Heroes' Guild basement * Coal truck mine * Temple of Ikov * Goblin Cave * Taverley Dungeon * Chaos Druid Tower dungeon
8 core logs of any type (eternal magic logs does not work)
Go back to the Odd Old Man's hut.
text.es: Vuelve a la cabaña del Odd Old Man.

text.en: Add logs, then a pot of bones to the pot boiler, and light it. Collect the bone when it finishes boiling after 12 seconds (hopping worlds will skip the boiling).
text.es: Añade troncos, luego una vasija de huesos a la caldera de huesos y enciéndela. Recoge el hueso cuando termine de hervir tras 12 segundos (cambiar de mundo saltará el hervido).

text.en: Repeat for the remaining bones.
text.es: Repite el proceso con los huesos restantes.

text.en: Talk to the Odd Old Man.
text.es: Habla con el Odd Old Man.

text.en: Quest complete!
